## pvectl qm rename

Rename a VM

```
pvectl qm rename [name-or-vmid] [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help          help for rename
      --name string   new name (skips the interactive prompt when set, along with the name-or-vmid argument)
```

      --debug     log Proxmox API request/response activity to stderr
      --verbose   show Proxmox task IDs (UPIDs) alongside action output
